label: Post-Ingestion Biotransformation
description: Convert ingredient-level compounds into biologically plausible post-ingestion metabolites

defaultOutputs.name: Relative Abundance
defaultOutputs.description: Quantiitative estimate of the compound’s relative concentration within the ingredient

defaultOutputs.name: Transformation Type
defaultOutputs.description: Predicted biological or chemical process affecting the compound post-ingestion.

defaultOutputs.name: Predicted Digested Product
defaultOutputs.description: Biologically plausible metabolite or breakdown product generated following gastrointestinal and metabolic processing.

defaultOutputs.name: Absorption Likelihood
defaultOutputs.description: Assessment of the predicted metabolite’s potential for systemic absorption, based on physicochemical properties and available metabolomic evidence
